sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 25:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 25:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot that are extended from the screen and below are called Guf, or ZAT (see answer 11). While the whole Partzuf is sometimes regarded as having only ten Sefirot, the first three Sefirot KHB are in the Rosh of the Partzuf, and the ZAT, which are HGT NHYM, are in the Guf of the Partzuf.
